message:
🌱 Add helm: helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with "bad math mission (#1029)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-5046-helm-completion-fails-in-zsh-prezto-with-bad-math-expression-operand-e",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with \"bad math expression: operand expected\"",
+    "description": "helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with \"bad math expression: operand expected\". This issue affects 61+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your helm installation:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\nhelm repo list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\nI noticed helm completion in zsh is not working.\nOne part of the problem is that _helm is not executable per default."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with \"bad math…",
+        "description": "Small fix.  Removes quotes in aliashash keys to work with ZSH.\n```yaml\nhelm _helm_root_command:12: bad math expression: operand expected at `\"del\"'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with \"bad… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest helm to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Small fix.  Removes quotes in aliashash keys to work with ZSH.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "helm _helm_root_command:12: bad math expression: operand expected at `\"del\"'",
+        "aliashash[\"del\"]=\"delete\"",
+        "aliashash[del]=\"delete\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
